title: Junior Instructional Designer at NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Chennai-based team.

About NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited:
NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
